Reports.description: Reload reports and save history snapshots.

Analyse.description: All static analysis actions, grouped by tool.

Linters.description: Lint-style checks over the source tree.

lint-module.description: Per-module lint, expanded from a forEach template.

actions.label: Echo Hello
actions.description: Simple shell command to test action execution.

actions.label: Reload Reports
actions.description: Reload all configured report files into the view.

actions.label: Save Snapshot
actions.description: Save a history snapshot of current issues.

actions.label: Analyse + Reload
actions.description: Run analysis then reload (simulated with echo + reload). Chains two actions.

actions.label: Grep Errors
actions.description: Search for 'error' keyword in src/ and generate reports/grep-report.json in CodeClimate format.

actions.label: Failing Action
actions.description: Always exits with error — tests the error state display.

actions.label: Echo Arg
actions.description: Chain target — echoes the forwarded argument ($1).

actions.label: Greet + Echo Arg
actions.description: Runs, then calls echo-arg forwarding a parameter.

actions.label: Lint ${mod}
actions.description: Templated action — expands to one per directory under src/, with ${mod} bound to each directory name.

actions.label: Lint All Modules
actions.description: Chains the lint-module template — runs every generated per-module action.
